title: project-manager: one SERVICE label on support issues
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Taming the label printer
gist.blurb: Our AI project manager was getting a little too enthusiastic with the label maker. We've tweaked its instructions so support issues now get exactly one service label, keeping our boards clean and tidy.
gist.summary: Updated the AI project manager prompt and normalization script to ensure support issues receive exactly one SERVICE label.
gist.impact: Internal support boards will be less noisy and easier to filter, as issues will no longer be tagged with multiple conflicting service labels.
gist.visual_concept: The AI project manager (represented by the Monitor Robot) holding a label maker, carefully applying a single label to a folder, while Polly the Bee helps organize a neat stack of single-labeled folders.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a label maker, carefully placing a single neat label on a folder. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a clipboard, giving a thumbs up. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
